metadata.description: Batch 21 of 50 — Oxford 3000 words 2001-2100; source-aligned sequence

words.definitionEn: ability to develop or a possible quality
words.definitionTh: ศักยภาพ / ที่อาจเกิดขึ้น
อาจเป็นไปได้
words.example: The fault could potentially stop the line.

words.definitionEn: a unit of weight or British money
to make liquid flow from a container
words.example: Pour the mixture into the mould.

words.definitionEn: the state of being very poor
words.example: The program aims to reduce poverty.

words.definitionEn: a dry substance of tiny particles
ability, energy, or control; to supply energy
words.definitionTh: พลัง / อำนาจ
words.example: Turn off the power before maintenance.

words.definitionEn: useful and suitable for real situations
words.definitionTh: ใช้ได้จริง

words.definitionEn: to do repeatedly to improve skill
approval or admiration; to express it
words.definitionTh: คำชม / ชมเชย

words.definitionEn: to say what is likely to happen
to like one thing more than another
words.definitionTh: ชอบมากกว่า

words.example: The team is prepared for the audit.

words.definitionEn: the fact of being in a place
words.definitionTh: การปรากฏตัว

words.definitionEn: current; a gift; to show or give
words.definitionTh: ปัจจุบัน / นำเสนอ

words.definitionEn: to keep something safe or unchanged
the elected head of a republic
words.definitionTh: ประธานาธิบดี

words.definitionEn: to push; newspapers and news organizations
words.definitionTh: กด / สื่อมวลชน

words.definitionEn: to behave as if something false were true
words.example: Do not pretend the problem is solved.

words.definitionTh: สวย / ค่อนข้าง

words.example: Compare this with the previous result.

words.definitionTh: ก่อนหน้านี้

words.definitionEn: the amount of money something costs; to set a cost

words.definitionTh: สำคัญที่สุด

words.definitionEn: a son of a king or queen
a daughter of a king or queen

words.example: The design follows a simple principle.

words.definitionEn: to produce text or images on paper; printed text

words.definitionTh: เครื่องพิมพ์
words.example: The printer is out of paper.

words.definitionEn: the process of producing printed material

words.definitionTh: ลำดับความสำคัญ

words.definitionEn: a building where criminals are kept
words.example: The offender was sent to prison.

words.definitionEn: freedom from unwanted attention or access
words.definitionTh: ความเป็นส่วนตัว

words.definitionEn: a series of actions producing a result
a person or company that makes goods
words.example: The company is a major producer.

words.definitionEn: relating to skilled paid work; a skilled worker

words.definitionTh: ศาสตราจารย์

words.definitionEn: a summary of characteristics or information
a set of coded instructions or planned activities

words.definitionTh: รายการ / หลักสูตร
ความก้าวหน้า

words.definitionEn: to say definitely that you will do something
to support or help something develop
in a correct or suitable way
words.definitionTh: อย่างเหมาะสม
โอกาสในอนาคต
การป้องกัน

words.example: The team is proud of the result.

words.definitionEn: to show that something is true
a specialist in human thoughts and behaviour
words.definitionTh: นักจิตวิทยา

words.definitionEn: the scientific study of mind and behaviour

words.example: They met at a local pub.
The report is available to the public.
The research appeared in a publication.

words.definitionEn: to make information available to the public
words.example: The team will publish the results.

words.definitionEn: to give a penalty for wrongdoing
to buy something; an act of buying
words.example: The company purchased a new camera.
Use pure water for the test.

words.definitionEn: a colour made from red and blue

words.definitionTh: วัตถุประสงค์
words.example: Explain the purpose of the test.

words.definitionEn: to continue trying to achieve or catch
words.example: We will pursue the best option.

words.definitionEn: to move something away with force

words.example: Put the sample on the table.

words.definitionEn: a skill, quality, or certificate showing suitability
words.example: The role requires a technical qualification.
